overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown districts at night. The video transitions from a bustling intersection with the iconic BELOW DECK sign, up through elevated streets, past futuristic architecture with heavy neon signage, into a darker foggy area with atmospheric lighting and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk downtown intersection with neon advertisements

events.description: yellow taxi drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection toward the BELOW DECK building, navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving through the intersection
pedestrian with pink hair crossing the street in white outfit

entered.detail: large teal neon sign reading BELOW DECK on futuristic building facade
tall futuristic buildings with holographic advertisements and neon lighting
wet asphalt intersection with yellow crosswalk markings and red curbs

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a bustling Night City intersection dominated by the large teal BELOW DECK neon sign. The streets are wet and reflective, with holographic advertisements covering the surrounding buildings. A yellow taxi passes through the intersection as the character crosses the street toward an inclined ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: inclined city street with neon storefronts and tunnel approach

events.description: character begins ascending the inclined street ramp

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined street ramp toward the 24/7 STORE sign

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving up the ramp ahead

entered.detail: large yellow neon sign reading 24/7 STORE on building facade
dark tunnel archway at the top of the ramp with vehicles entering
building covered with multiple glowing holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep inclined street flanked by tall buildings covered in holographic advertisements. The prominent yellow 24/7 STORE neon sign marks the destination ahead, while a dark tunnel entrance looms at the top of the ramp. The environment feels enclosed like an urban canyon with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with curved glass atrium and heavy signage

events.description: turning right at the top of the ramp into open plaza area with curved glass structure
crossing the intersection as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: turning and crossing the intersection near the curved glass building with teal lighting

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi turning at the intersection
black car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: large curved glass structure with teal cyan neon lighting inside
large vertical billboard displaying a monster creature and CIRKUS text
yellow striped crosswalk on wet asphalt with red borders

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the ramp, the scene opens into a wider intersection dominated by a distinctive curved glass atrium glowing with teal light. The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, passing the CIRKUS billboard featuring a monstrous figure. Vehicles including a yellow taxi navigate the intersection as the character moves toward another tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy downtown intersection with heavy atmospheric haze and neon reflections

events.description: scene transitions to much darker, foggier atmosphere with reduced visibility
futuristic sports car with glowing red taillights drives past closely

agents.ego_description: navigating through the foggy, neon-lit streets with heavy atmospheric haze and wet reflective pavement

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car with glowing red taillights driving past
group of pedestrians waiting at the street corner near neon signs

entered.detail: multi-tiered circular structure with rotating holographic advertisements
large vertical billboard with FERVID text and human figure graphic
rain-slicked asphalt creating mirror-like reflections of neon lights

segments.scene_description: The atmosphere shifts dramatically to a dark, foggy night with heavy atmospheric haze obscuring distant skyscrapers. The streets are slick with rain, creating vivid reflections of the surrounding neon signage. The character passes a distinctive circular advertising tower and the FERVID billboard while navigating through moderate traffic, with futuristic vehicles passing by on the wet roads.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban center that transitions from a bustling commercial intersection into a dark, atmospheric fog. It begins at a wet intersection dominated by a teal BELOW DECK sign and holographic advertisements, following a character as they cross the street and ascend a steep, canyon-like ramp flanked by towering buildings. As the character reaches the top of the incline, the scene opens into a wider plaza featuring a glowing curved glass atrium and a monstrous CIRKUS billboard. The environment then shifts dramatically as the camera moves through a tunnel and emerges into a heavy, rain-slicked haze that obscures the distant skyscrapers. Finally, the shot glides past a circular advertising tower and the FERVID billboard, with futuristic vehicles cutting through the thick atmospheric fog and vivid neon reflections.
